query:
SELECT externalId, planName, serviceType, supplierName, customerName, customerExternalId, monthlyCost, status
FROM services
WHERE (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '')
  AND status NOT IN ('billing_platform_stub', 'terminated')
  AND supplierName NOT IN ('Telstra', 'SasBoss', 'ABB', 'AAPT')
LIMIT 10;
